summary: Software engineer with 22 years of experience building, scaling, and rescuing systems across the full stack. 11 years at Cornerstone, growing from first in-house engineer on an early-stage product to Principal Engineer on enterprise-wide platform initiatives.

highlights.label: Cloud Architecture
highlights.text: Rebuilt cloud architecture for Grovo's acquired content authoring platform and catalog library, a critical enabler of Cornerstone's Content business scaling from $0 to $75M ARR over 3 years; reduced infrastructure costs 30% via RabbitMQ → SNS/SQS migration and on-demand Lambda conversion

highlights.label: Systems Design
highlights.text: Designed and shipped a multi-tenant Slack integration for an enterprise LMS (Lambda, SQS, DynamoDB), reducing friction in learning workflows by surfacing transcript search, training launch, and notifications directly inside employees' existing tools

highlights.label: Feature Delivery
highlights.text: Worked across C#/.NET services and React/TypeScript front-ends, delivering customer-facing features across multiple product areas

highlights.label: Leadership
highlights.text: Mentored and guided engineers across two globally distributed teams

highlights.label: DevOps
highlights.text: Created operational workflows and automated scaling policies enabling domain team ownership of the Content Authoring system, reducing operational overhead and improving deployment reliability

highlights.label: Product Innovation
highlights.text: As technical lead on a 4-person startup-within-Cornerstone, drove Cornerstone for Salesforce from $200k to $6M ARR — owning architecture decisions, leading major platform evolutions, and shipping across the full product lifecycle

highlights.label: API Development
highlights.text: Designed and built C#/.NET Web API services for Learning Management, Record System, and Reporting

highlights.label: Leadership
highlights.text: Founded the engineering function — hired and onboarded the team, established SDLC, test automation, and customer support workflows, creating the operational foundation the product was built on

roles.title: Senior Software Developer
bullets: Built advisor-facing web applications and services on C#/.NET/MVC — commerce, marketing services, SAML SSO, and co-branded experiences
Integrated via iframe within a major retail partner's site to deliver a seamless client-facing experience

roles.title: Software Developer / Engineering Manager
bullets: Joined via acquisition; built lead generation and content management platforms. Managed the team through integration into Apollo

skills.label: AI & LLM
skills.text: AI & LLM: Claude, OpenAI Codex · Agentic prototype development/orchestration · LLM API integration

skills.label: Cloud & Infrastructure
skills.text: AWS (Lambda, ECS, EventBridge, SQS, SNS), Docker, Serverless, IaC, CI/CD, Jenkins, Git

skills.label: Languages
skills.text: C#, JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, Java, SQL, Groovy

skills.label: Architecture
skills.text: Microservices, Event-Driven Architecture, REST, OData, Distributed Messaging
